proposed.song: Моё Сердце Сейчас Это Открытая Рана
Три полоски (original) by Music Master Тула
Вся Вера И Любовь Этого Мира
Десятки Тысяч Никому Не Нужных Судеб
На Половину Прав, На Полпути Отсюда

tunings.name: E Standard
tunings.desc: Standard tuning. Most songs live here.

tunings.name: Drop C
tunings.desc: D standard with the 6th dropped to C.

tunings.name: C Standard
tunings.desc: Two whole steps down. Heavy low end.

tunings.name: Drop D
tunings.desc: Low E dropped to D. One-finger power chords.

tunings.name: D Standard
tunings.desc: Whole step down. Thicker, heavier body.

tunings.name: E♭ Standard
tunings.desc: Half step down. Hendrix, Guns N' Roses, lots of metal.

tunings.name: Drop B
tunings.desc: Very low and heavy. Slipknot Vol. 3 territory.

tunings.name: Drop C#
tunings.desc: E♭ standard with the 6th string dropped to C#.

tunings.name: C# Standard
tunings.desc: Minor third down. Dark and low.

tunings.name: Drop A
tunings.desc: Lower than Drop B. Slipknot go here for a handful of songs.

tunings.name: A1 E2 A2 D3 E3 A3 D4
B1 E2 A2 D3 G3 B3
E2 G2 D3 G3 B3 E4
DADGAD
tunings.desc: Modal, droning, open. Celtic and Zeppelin.

tunings.name: D2 A2 D3 G3 B3 D4
D2 G2 D3 G3 B3 E4
E2 G2 D3 G3 E3 D4
Open E
tunings.desc: Open D shapes at standard pitch. Bottleneck blues.

tunings.name: Open G
tunings.desc: Keith Richards territory (he drops the 6th string entirely).

Open D
tunings.desc: Strums an open D major. Slide favourite.
